# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "1.1"
services:
- name: serviceA
  url: http://serviceA.com
  routes:
  - name: route_to_serviceA
    paths:
    - /serviceA
    strip_path: true
- name: serviceB
  url: http://serviceB.com
  routes:
  - name: route_to_serviceB
    paths:
    - /serviceB
    strip_path: true
upstreams:
- name: upstreamA
  targets:
  - target: serviceA.node1.com:8000
  - target: serviceA.node2.com:8000
- name: upstreamB
  targets:
  - target: serviceB.node1.com:8000
  - target: serviceB.node2.com:8000
